<context>
Cognitive mode: constructive-architect
Type: flexible
</context>

<objective>
Post-run report generator for Capillary Playwright API test suites. Reads the Playwright JSON reporter output from a test run and produces a consistent set of artifacts — Markdown summaries (overall / failures / flaky / skipped), a machine-readable JSON rollup, a self-contained HTML dashboard, a Slack-ready summary, and an appended run-history NDJSON. Bundled so every Capillary suite generates reports in the same shape and one QA dashboard pattern works for all of them.

Phases:

- detect: Confirm this is a Capillary test repo (Playwright + library companion) and that a Playwright JSON results file exists
- bootstrap: First-run-only — `npm install` inside the bundled tool
- run: Invoke the bundled report generator from the test repo cwd
- report: Open report.html, surface headline numbers (pass/fail/flaky/skipped), flag failures
  </objective>
